title: Saraswati Bhandar Vishnu Puran, Volume I, No. 1, for April, 1910
gloss: Vishnu Puran, containing an Urdu translation of the first half of the Vishnu Puran, edited by Babu Shiv Brat Lal, M. A., Lahore.
publisher: Lala Gauri Shankar Lal, Manager, Sadhu and Tatv Darshi
copyright: Lala Gauri Shankar Lal, Lahore; No. 86, dated the 20th August, 1910.
notes: Shiv Brat Lal's Purana-translation periodical — his fourth appearance this quarter; Sadhu magazine network.

title: Saraswati Bhandar, Volume I, No. 2, for May, 1910
gloss: Kalki Puran, containing an Urdu translation of the complete Kalki Puran.
publisher: Gauri Shankar Lal, Manager, Sadhu and Tatv Darshi
copyright: Lala Gauri Shankar Lal, Lahore; No. 87, dated the 20th August, 1910.

title: Saraswati Bhandar, Volume I, No. 3, for June 1910
gloss: Vichar Kalpadram, containing an Urdu adaptation of Vichar Sagar of Nishchal Das, a well-known Hindi Vedantic book.
publisher: Lala Gauri Shankar Lal, Manager, Sadhu and Tatv Darshi
copyright: Lala Gauri Shankar Lal, Lahore; No. 88, dated the 20th August, 1910.
notes: Final entry of the quarter. Catalogue signed: 'SURAJ NARAYAN, MEHR, Reporter on Books, Education Department, Punjab. Lahore: The 15th November, 1910.' Colophon: Punjab Government Press, Lahore—23-12-10—2043—92.
